description: DealSignal is a B2B data platform giving sales and marketing teams on-demand access to over 1 billion verified contacts at 97% or higher accuracy.
tagline: Fresh, accurate B2B data verified on-demand
overview: DealSignal is a B2B data platform that provides sales and marketing teams with on-demand access to over 1 billion verified global contacts, backed by a 97% accuracy guarantee. Teams use it to build precise decision-maker lists, enrich inbound leads, and keep CRM data current for account-based and data-driven outreach programs.
what_is: DealSignal is a B2B data platform built for sales and marketing teams that need reliable, verified contact information at scale. It covers more than 1 billion global contacts and backs each record with a 97% accuracy rate and a 100% data guarantee. Teams rely on it to reach the right buyers, protect email deliverability, and drive higher conversion rates across their outreach programs.

The platform is well suited for building targeted decision-maker lists, enriching inbound form submissions, and improving the overall quality of CRM records. Users typically see pipeline growth accelerate shortly after onboarding because their outreach is reaching accurate contacts from day one. It is most valuable for professionals running account-based marketing or data-driven sales motions where contact accuracy is critical.

DealSignal connects with common CRM and marketing tools to automate data refreshes and keep records from going stale. It is focused on B2B contact and account data rather than consumer records, and it does not include a built-in sales engagement or sequencing layer. Teams looking for a precision data provider to complement their existing outreach infrastructure will find it a strong fit.
